title: leucanthemum vulgare
intro: Leucanthemum vulgare, commonly known as the oxeye daisy, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Leucanthemum vulgare include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Leucanthemum vulgare include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and other health issues.
